microsoft_ft: Owned **end-to-end product development** of Azure's Resilience Automation Platform from 0→1, defining requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and scaled to 45+ annual drills.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability — delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous validation model.

Built an internal **AI agent** that restructured planning workflows, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21%, translating new model capabilities into tangible operational value.
Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**.
microsoft_2023: Translated **AI-driven code generation** capabilities into measurable user value by championing adoption across 14 key teams through demos and training, saving 37 engineering hours monthly.
Developed deep user empathy through **11+ interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps that directly influenced the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation.
Boosted engagement depth with AI tooling by migrating documentation to a **semantic search** platform with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% across internal users.

Built product strategy to reduce launch toil by conducting discovery with 20+ service teams, identifying **81 hours of manual effort** per region and roadmapping automation for critical execution paths.
Enabled leadership to target high-impact automation gaps by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil and creator-side bottlenecks across 140+ teams.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **OS migration strategy** and mapped dependencies across 1,200+ stations, achieving zero operational downtime during a 2,000+ unit pilot — balancing near-term execution with long-term platform stability.
Prioritized a **40+ ticket backlog** through Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, stabilizing the developer intake process and unblocking cross-functional engineering and operations teams.
Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and improving continuous delivery quality.
pro_painters: Increased **job bookings by 26%** by owning end-to-end scoping and invoicing for 200+ monthly proposals, redesigning CRM workflows to improve conversion depth and user experience.
Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by 13% and **boosted conversions by 2.7%** by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and discovery surfaces.
Improved leadership pricing models by analyzing **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks, translating raw data into actionable product and operational recommendations.
